raw_text: {"intent":"Extract atomic preference memories from the provided table.","decision":"Commit two separate preference memory cards, one per person, with no detected conflicts or ambiguity beyond the source phrasing.","memory_cards":[{"kind":"preference","statement":"Sam likes Bill Evans.","confidence":"high","entities":[{"name":"Sam","type":"person"},{"name":"Goldman","type":"firm"}],"relationships":[{"subject":"Sam","predicate":"likes","object":"Bill Evans"}]},{"kind":"preference","statement":"Anna likes Barolo.","confidence":"high","entities":[{"name":"Anna","type":"person"},{"name":"JPM","type":"firm"}],"relationships":[{"subject":"Anna","predicate":"likes","object":"Barolo"}]}],"entity_resolution":{"action":"none","entity_id":null,"reason":"The table provides only names and firms; no prior identity mapping is available or needed for extraction."},"conflict_classification":"none","answer":"2 memory cards extracted.","citations":["Dinner 2026-05-05","Lunch 2026-05-01"],"repair_options":[],"receipt":{"success":true,"details":["Extracted Sam's music preference from Dinner 2026-05-05.","Extracted Anna's wine preference from Lunch 2026-05-01."]}}
